title: Resource Pack Manifest
description: The manifest.json file for a Minecraft Bedrock Edition resource pack. Every resource pack requires a manifest with a unique UUID, version info, and module declarations. Resource packs contain textures, models, sounds, and UI customizations.

format_version.title: Format Version
format_version.description: The format version of this manifest file. Use 2 for modern packs.

header.title: Header
header.description:
The header section containing the pack's identity: name, description, unique UUID, and version.

Properties:
• modules
• dependencies

modules.title: Modules
modules.description:
Declares modules within the pack. For resource packs, use type 'resources'.

Properties:
• description
• language (string)
• type (string)
• uuid (string)
• version (string)
• entry (string)

language.description: The scripting language of this module (e.g., 'javascript').

entry.description: Script entry point for this pack.

dependencies.title: Dependencies
dependencies.description:
Optional list of other packs this pack depends on, referenced by UUID and version.

Properties:
• uuid (string)
• module_name (string)
• version (string)

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Optional metadata about the pack including author names, license, and URL.

capabilities.title: Capabilities
capabilities.description: Optional array of special capabilities required by this pack.

subpacks.title: Subpacks
subpacks.description: Optional subpack options for different quality levels.
